tasks.title: Domain: validateUrl guard (trim, non-empty, scheme allowlist, host, length)
tasks.dod: validateUrl(raw) returns normalized url or throws typed validation error; pure, unit-testable; first red→green target = empty url (AC-02)

tasks.title: Domain: dedup — reuse existing code for an already-stored normalized url
tasks.dod: createLink looks up the normalized url; if present returns existing code and inserts nothing

tasks.title: App: 400 on invalid, 200 on dedup, 201 on new
tasks.dod: POST /api/shorten maps validation error to 400 {error}, dedup hit to 200 {code}, new create to 201; seed tests (tests/unit/shorten.test.js, tests/integration/shorten.test.js) stay green

tasks.title: Обморда: inline validation error under the form
tasks.dod: a 400 shows the error message inline instead of a silent failure

tasks.title: Tests: unit + integration for AC-01..07
tasks.dod: npm run test:fast green; empty/scheme/malformed/too-long/trim/dedup all covered
